title: Sardoran

'''Sardoran''',<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> at one point known as '''Ord Sardoran''',<ref name="EGTW" /> was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|419|Ord}} states that the term "[[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]]" and the abbreviation "Ord" applied to certain [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].</ref> located in the [[Sardoran system/Legends|Sardoran system]],<ref name="TEA Sardoran" /> a part of the [[Arrowhead]], or [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="Arrowhead" /> the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA Sardoran" /> It served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Pius Dea Era]], a period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that lasted between approximately [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]] and [[11,000 BBY]].<ref name="EGTW" /> The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Casti Tholon]], who was active<ref name="AIR" /> by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> was [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to Sardoran, although she grew up in<ref name="AIR" /> the Core Worlds'<ref name="EGTW" /> [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sardoran was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Sardoran [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world itself, in grid square M-11,<ref name="TEA Sardoran" /> while the [[2012]] reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Paul R. Urquhart]] introduced its earlier name "Ord Sardoran."<ref name="EGTW" />
